geographic.title: Proximity to National Laboratories
geographic.description: Located within 250 miles of Sandia National Laboratories, Los Alamos National Laboratory, and White Sands Missile Range, enabling close collaboration and facility access.

geographic.title: US-Mexico Border Research Corridor
geographic.description: Unique position on the US-Mexico border provides access to binational research networks, cross-border data systems, and international collaboration pipelines.

geographic.title: Southwest Energy Hub
geographic.description: Situated in a region with major solar, wind, and natural gas resources, enabling energy research with direct access to real-world energy infrastructure.

geographic.title: Fort Bliss and Defense Ecosystem
geographic.description: Adjacent to one of the largest military installations in the US, providing proximity to defense research applications and workforce.

institutional.title: Carnegie R1 Research University
institutional.description: Classified as a Doctoral University with Very High Research Activity, reflecting sustained research output and doctoral program strength.

institutional.title: Aerospace Center for Excellence (ACE)
institutional.description: Dedicated center providing advanced aerospace research capabilities, wind tunnels, and testing infrastructure for defense and energy applications.

institutional.title: AAII: Aerospace and AI Institute
institutional.description: Dedicated institute focused on AI, machine learning, and aerospace applications, providing cross-disciplinary research infrastructure and coordination.

institutional.title: Established DOE Research Portfolio
institutional.description: Track record of DOE-funded research across multiple departments, demonstrating institutional capacity to manage federal research programs.

infrastructure.title: High-Performance Computing Resources
infrastructure.description: On-campus HPC clusters supporting large-scale simulation, data analytics, and AI model training for computationally intensive research.

infrastructure.title: Advanced Manufacturing and Materials Labs
infrastructure.description: Facilities for materials characterization, additive manufacturing, and testing that support energy and defense research applications.

infrastructure.title: Cybersecurity Research Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Dedicated cybersecurity research infrastructure supporting secure systems design, threat analysis, and national security applications.

infrastructure.title: W.M. Keck Center for 3D Innovation
infrastructure.description: Nationally recognized center for additive manufacturing, 3D printing, and rapid prototyping supporting materials and engineering research.
